case_title: DANNY S WONG VS. MALEE NGOW TANG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY WONG, DANNY S AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, MALEE NGOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WONG, DANNY S
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE. REQUEST FOR A RESET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, DANNY S
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-13-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-05-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED DEC-05-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, MALEE NGOW

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, DANNY S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANG, MALEE NGOW $4,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,485.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TANG, MALEE NGOW RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT WONG, DANNY S $4,460.40 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,460.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
